<?php namespace Bedigit\Breadcrumbs; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Facade; /** * @method static self add(string $title, ?string $url = null) * @method static self setHome(string $title, ?string $url = null) * @method static self clear() * @method static array getItems() * @method static bool hasItems() * @method static string render(?string $view = null) * * @see \Bedigit\Breadcrumbs\Breadcrumb */ class BreadcrumbFacade extends Facade { protected static function getFacadeAccessor(): string { return 'breadcrumb'; } }
